What Happened

Major events, music, film, tech & prices from 2020

The World in 2020
🌍EventsCOVID-19 pandemic declared by WHO (Mar 11) · Kobe Bryant killed in helicopter crash (Jan 26) · George Floyd murdered; Black Lives Matter protests sweep US (May–Jun) · SpaceX launches first crewed mission from US soil since 2011 · Biden elected 46th US President (Nov 3) · COVID-19 vaccines approved; first shots given (Dec)
🎵MusicBlinding Lights – The Weeknd
🎬FilmBad Boys for Life
💻TechmRNA COVID-19 vaccines were developed and approved in record time
🛒PricesBread $1.67 · Gas $2.17/gal · House $296,900

What major events happened in 2020?

2020 was a year of significant world events that shaped history. From political upheavals to cultural milestones, the year left a lasting mark on society. The music charts, cinema screens, and technological landscape of 2020 reflect the era's unique character. Prices for everyday goods like bread, gasoline, and homes give a vivid snapshot of the economic climate of the time.

Why is 2020 historically significant?

Each year carries its own defining moments and cultural touchstones. 2020 contributed unique chapters to the story of the 20th and 21st centuries. Whether you lived through 2020 or are researching it, the events, art, technology, and everyday costs of that year paint a rich picture of life at the time.

Frequently asked questions

What major events happened in 2020?

Key world events of 2020 include the milestones listed above. These ranged across politics, war, science, and culture, shaping the course of modern history.

What was the #1 song in 2020?

The top song of 2020 is listed in the music row above. Popular music in 2020 reflected the tastes and mood of the era.

What movies came out in 2020?

The standout film of 2020 is shown in the film row above. Cinema in 2020 captured the spirit of the times and influenced popular culture for years to come.

What did things cost in 2020?

In 2020, everyday prices included the figures shown in the prices row above for bread, gasoline, and the average house. These numbers illustrate how much purchasing power and the cost of living have changed over time.

What technology was new in 2020?

The tech highlight of 2020 is described in the technology row above. Innovations from 2020 often laid the groundwork for technologies we rely on today.
